era: 1977. Hard Rock. E=8 -- arena-filling power, Wilson sisters at maximum command, live Barracuda touring cycle.

theory_nodes.concept: Barracuda origin: written in response to Mushroom Records tabloid fabrication implying incest. Fury is authentic. The tritone riff (diabolus in musica) is the sonic embodiment of that fury.
theory_nodes.description: Real anger producing real riff. The origin story is the song.

theory_nodes.concept: Wilson sisters as hard rock pioneers: Ann's operatic vocal power and Nancy's technical guitar mastery in a genre that excluded women from leadership roles. No manifesto required -- the music was the argument.
theory_nodes.description: Gender barrier broken by excellence, not declaration.

theory_nodes.concept: Bellevue origin. First sustained Eastside engine entry. Heart absorbed into Seattle's identity through success, not neighborhood networks.
theory_nodes.description: Bellevue as launchpad. East side enters the engine at 269.

cross_references.relationship: Individual portrait precedes combined power. Engine builds the Wilson sisters as individuals before returning to Heart.
Guitar analysis. Nancy's range (acoustic to electric) documented before the combined Heart sound revisited.
E=8 continues. Hard rock to hardcore. Portrait Records to Alternative Tentacles. THREE-QUARTERS MARK at degree 270.

sps_pair.pairing_note: Both multi-voice, layered, celebratory. Heart's rock layers vs. the forest edge symphony. ORCA ARC opens on SPS side at 269.
